title: Poached Medjool Dates with Pistachio Crust
description: A classic French dessert featuring poached medjool dates served with a crunchy pistachio crust.
instructions: Preheat the water to 180°F (82°C) for poaching.
Rinse the dates and remove the pits.
Cut the dates in half lengthwise.
In a food processor, grind the pistachios until coarsely chopped.
Add the brown sugar and salt to the processor and mix until well combined.
Add the butter and mix until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Poach the dates for 5-7 minutes, or until they are tender.
Drain the dates and serve with the pistachio crust.
Sprinkle the pistachio crust over the dates and serve immediately.
